rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Application For A Prelim Injunction To Halt Foreclosuire Proceedings And Other Actions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 6, 2011, line 15, PLAINTIFF GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY Notice Of Application For A Preliminary Injunction To Halt Foreclosure Proceedings And Other Actions. Plaintiff¿s Motion for Preliminary Injunction: Deny without prejudice. =(302/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 6, 2011, line 15, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer to First Amended Complaint: Sustain with leave to amend as to all causes of action. First cause of action for breach of contract does not state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action. (CCP 430.10(e)). Second cause of action for breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing does not state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action (CCP 430.10(e)), in light of ruling on first cause of action. Without a contract there can be no breach of an implied covenant. Third cause of action for fraud does not state facts sufficient to state a cause of action (CCP 430.10(e)) and is not pled with particularity. If plaintiff files a Second Amended Complaint, all of the operative allegations should be in that pleading; the Court should not need to refer to prior declarations to understand plaintiff¿s claims. =(302/MJM)
